prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the management of Income Tax for sole traders and property landlords, which applies primarily to England, where HM Revenue and Customs regulations are enforced. The references to the Making Tax Digital initiative indicate its relevance to English tax legislation.
